login.title: Log in
login.subtitle: Sign in to manage your MCPs.

register.title: Create an account
register.subtitle: Register to start exposing your local MCPs.
register.secretHint: The REGISTER_SECRET configured on the backend.
register.checkEmailBody: We've sent an activation link to finish setting up your account.

sidenav.notElectron: Install the desktop app or the browser extension to tunnel MCPs

mcps.title: MCPs
mcps.subtitle: Configure the local MCP servers your desktop agent exposes.
mcps.name: Name
mcps.confirmRemove: Remove "{{name}}"? Any client calling it will stop working immediately.
mcps.empty: No MCPs yet — add one above.

logs.title: Logs
logs.subtitle: Requests and responses proxied to your MCPs.
logs.subtitleFiltered: Requests and responses proxied to this MCP.
logs.confirmDeleteSelected: Delete {{count}} selected log entries? This can't be undone.
logs.confirmDeleteAll: Delete every log entry for every MCP? This can't be undone.
logs.confirmDeleteAllFiltered: Delete every log entry for this MCP? This can't be undone.

apiKeys.title: API Keys
apiKeys.subtitle: Generate long-lived keys to authenticate MCP calls from outside the desktop app.
apiKeys.name: Name
apiKeys.createdHint: Copy it now — it won't be shown again.
apiKeys.confirmRevoke: Revoke this API key? Anything using it will stop working immediately.
apiKeys.empty: No API keys yet — generate one above.

marketplace.title: Marketplace
marketplace.subtitle: Browse published MCPs and download the version you need.
marketplace.confirmUninstall: Uninstall "{{name}}" from this system? This deletes its installed files and can't be undone.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Configure the desktop app.
settings.downloadDirectoryHint: Marketplace downloads are unzipped here automatically and the zip is deleted afterwards.

marketplacePublish.title: Publish
marketplacePublish.subtitle: Create a new marketplace listing and upload its first version.
marketplacePublish.name: Name

marketplaceMyReleases.title: My Releases
marketplaceMyReleases.subtitle: Manage your published marketplace listings.
marketplaceMyReleases.name: Name
marketplaceMyReleases.confirmRemove: Remove "{{name}}"? This deletes every version and cannot be undone.
marketplaceMyReleases.confirmRemoveVersion: Remove version "{{version}}"? This cannot be undone.

marketplaceDetail.notFound: This marketplace item couldn't be found — it may be private or have been removed.
marketplaceDetail.noFiles: No file information available for this version.

marketplaceInstalled.title: On this system
marketplaceInstalled.subtitle: Marketplace items you've downloaded and installed on this machine.
marketplaceInstalled.confirmUninstall: Uninstall "{{name}}" from this system? This deletes its installed files and can't be undone.
marketplaceInstalled.empty: Nothing installed yet — download something from the Marketplace.
